source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Operational English UI with Japanese typography guidance for restoration plans, monitoring tables, status labels, and calm dashboard headings.
layout: Postfire meadow planning dashboards, 8px radii, ash-line dividers, charred navigation, magenta active states, leaf-green progress signals, and quiet regrowth spacing.

prompts.label: Transparent Fireweed motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Fireweed transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a single complete fireweed stalk for a design-system catalog, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: fireweed stalk with slender vertical stem, alternating lance-shaped leaf green leaves, tiers of vivid magenta-pink four-petal flowers and a few buds at the top, subtle ash-grey dust and charred neutral undertones on the lower stem, accurate botanical form, crisp silhouette edges, natural petal and leaf texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; portrait orientation; show the full stalk, leaves, flower tiers, and buds without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves fireweed magenta petals, ash-grey stem shadows, leaf green, and regrowth-meadow highlights.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ffff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform cyan color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ffff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no vase, no bouquet, no hand, no landscape, no soil clump, no fire flames, no text, no watermark, no second plant.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Fireweed light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board named "Morphous Fireweed", derived from the fireweed stalk motif shown in context: magenta-pink flowers, ash-grey lower stem, leaf green leaves, charred neutral depth, and meadow regrowth highlights.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the fireweed motif image. The board must visibly respect only motif-derived colors: fireweed magenta, ash grey, leaf green, charred neutral depth, soft meadow highlight, petal blush, stem umber, regrowth cream.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 design board, 3840x2160 pixels, crisp high-resolution source asset.
Required visible sections: title, motif story, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, generated asset examples.
Typography: include English UI examples and Japanese typography guidance with short readable labels such as "日本語 UI", "見出し", "本文", "状態".
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product design system, regrowth planning system for postfire meadow restoration, precise grid, calm operational dashboard, 8px card radius, ash-line dividers, leaf-green planning states, magenta active controls, charred-neutral sidebars, meadow highlight focus rings.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, charts, table rows, command palette, search field, navigation rail, dashboard metrics, empty/error/loading/success states, spacing scale, radius token, border token, shadow token, CSS variable token chips.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; include "Morphous Fireweed", "Palette", "Type", "日本語", "Components", "Navigation", "Dashboard", "Forms", "Tables", "Command", "Status", "Tokens", "Texture", "Radius 8px", "Spacing", "Shadows".
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no flames as decoration, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible tiny token tables, no pure stock UI kit look.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Fireweed dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode version of the "Morphous Fireweed" design-system board. It must feel like the same regrowth planning system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the transparent fireweed motif and the light-mode Morphous Fireweed board shown in context as references. Preserve the motif-derived palette roles, component language, 8px radii, ash-line dividers, magenta active states, leaf-green planning states, charred-neutral navigation, meadow-highlight focus rings, and Japanese typography guidance.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 design board, 3840x2160 pixels, crisp high-resolution source asset.
Required visible sections: title, Dark Mode, motif story, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, generated asset examples.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors translated for dark mode: charred black-brown background, ash grey surfaces and borders, fireweed magenta controls, petal blush hover states, leaf green success/planning signals, stem umber warning/caution, regrowth cream foreground, meadow highlight focus.
Typography: include English UI examples and Japanese typography guidance with short readable labels such as "日本語 UI", "見出し", "本文", "状態".
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product design system, calm operational dark dashboard for postfire meadow restoration planning, precise grid, 8px card radius, restrained contrast, subtle charred bark texture, ash-grey cards, readable labels.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, charts, table rows, command palette, search field, navigation rail, dashboard metrics, empty/error/loading/success states, spacing scale, radius token, border token, shadow token, CSS variable token chips.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; include "Morphous Fireweed", "Dark Mode", "Palette", "Type", "日本語", "Components", "Navigation", "Dashboard", "Forms", "Tables", "Command", "Status", "Tokens", "Texture", "Radius 8px", "Spacing", "Shadows".
Constraints: no neon colors, no flat pure-black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no flames as decoration, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible tiny token tables.
